name: Cloud Files
description: Upload files to your own sync server and get them back on every device. Everything is end-to-end encrypted on your device before upload — the server only ever stores unreadable data. Files count against your account's 3 GB storage quota, shown as a usage bar. Requires signing in under Settings → Sync & account.
details:
Upload files to your own sync server and pull them back down on any other device signed into the same account.

Everything is encrypted on-device before it ever leaves your machine, so the server only ever holds unreadable data. Files count against your account's 3 GB quota, shown as a usage bar in the plugin. Requires signing in under Settings → Sync & account.
